calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-08-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday Jan. 8, 2015 in Department 525:
Tracy Banks, Respondent/Plaintiff appears as Propria Persona with witnesses Megan Pinkerton and Martin Navarrete.
Ranee Kemmerer, Appellant/Defendant appears in Propria Persona with witness Boivin Ramses.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn. Tracy Banks testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence is introduced: Exhibits not marked - text messages, copy of checks, photos/photos of deck, e-mails, breakdown of the bill.

Martin Navarrete testifies on behalf of Tracy Banks and responds to questions from Judge Commins. Ranee Kemmerer cross examines Martin Navarrete.

Ranee Kemmerer testifies on her own behalf. The following documentary evidence are introduced: Exhibits not marked - electronic copies of checks; shown signature on proof of service on cell phone and to compare with signature on the Passport to the Court; letter from Brooks Furniture; photos of home and damages.

Boivin Ramses testified on behalf of Ranee Kemmerer and responds to questions from Judge Commins.

Closing argument presented by both parties.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court takes this matter under submission. Newly evidence retained by the Court.

Judge Pro Tempore: David H.S. Commins; Clerk J. Kong; matter not reported.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-01-2014 Continued To Jan-08-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
